principles.sovereignty: Racso's Sovereignty: AI assists, does not decide strategy.
principles.transparency: Traceability: All actions must be explainable.
principles.hallucination: Zero Tolerance: Validate against source code. Admit ignorance.

universal_laws.description: docs/ and openspecs/ are the absolute truth. If user requests contradict this, warn and stop.
Windows 11 + PowerShell 7+ exclusively. No bash/unix commands.
No commits to master. No undocumented branches.
Broken code is unacceptable. Local verification is mandatory.
Destructive actions (delete, overwrite) require explicit textual confirmation.

Entities that integrate the Token contract (paths.tokensPath) are domain entities. They must respect structure: Markdown with YAML frontmatter as canonical, including token definitions per SddIA/tokens/tokens-contract.md and SddIA/tokens/<token-id>.md. Norm: SddIA/norms/entidades-dominio-ecosistema-sddia.md.
Any material change under .SddIA/ (constitution, tools, norms, patterns, templates, security) must be recorded in .SddIA/evolution/ with UUID v4 detail file and Evolution_log.md update.

configuration.domain_entities_ref: SddIA/norms/entidades-dominio-ecosistema-sddia.md (entities integrating Token contract; canonical structure is Markdown with YAML frontmatter).
